dod_results.summary: All 4 Objective ops and 4 Component ops exist across REST, CLI, and MCP; live MCP tools/list returns 51.
Missing Objective.statement and missing Component.name/access_path return field-level 422 validation errors.
Unknown attached_to_kind is rejected by Pydantic Literal validation.
Raw invalid attached_to_kind inserts raise IntegrityError, preserving DB CHECK defense in depth.
Cross-actor updates return 403 objective_update_forbidden / component_update_forbidden with details.
Update models and tests enforce the allowed update fields; attached_to_* and created_by_actor_id are not accepted.
Objective and Component list ops support cursor pagination, DESC order, bounded limit, and include_deactivated behavior.
get_project/get_pipeline/get_job populate objectives and components direct/inherited arrays; job direct arrays stay empty while inherited pipeline/project rows populate.
REST, CLI, and MCP objective/component payloads are covered by the parity harness.
Successful mutations write audit rows and denial paths preserve BusinessRuleException error codes/details.
OpenAPI and MCP snapshots were regenerated and copied back from the rebuilt API container.
Corrected full regression scope passed: apps/api/tests + apps/cli/tests + tests/parity.
mypy strict is clean across API+CLI; ruff is clean across API, CLI, tests, and parity.

verification.red: initial AQ2-87 focused suite failed with 15 expected route/response gaps; later full regression caught 2 stale MCP inventory expectations
verification.mypy: clean across 70 source files using corrected CI scope: apps/api/src/aq_api/ apps/cli/src/aq_cli/
verification.ruff: all checks passed on apps/api/src apps/api/tests apps/cli/src apps/cli/tests tests/parity

risks_or_deviations: The Docker image copies source rather than bind-mounting it, so generated snapshots were copied back from the rebuilt API container after pytest --update-snapshots.
The live HTTP MCP tool-count check used a temporary API key inserted for the check and deleted immediately after; the key was not persisted in evidence.
handoff: AQ2-88 may proceed in parallel after AQ2-86; AQ2-89 waits for AQ2-87 and AQ2-88 to merge.
